title: Tesla launches Oasis Supercharger with solar farm and Off-grid Batteries
content: Tesla has launched its new â€œOasisâ€ Supercharger station in Lost Hills, California, featuring 168 EV chargersâ€”84 now operationalâ€”and powered entirely by 11 MW of ground-mounted solar panels and 10 Tesla Megapacks with 39 MWh of battery storage. Spanning 30 acres, the station can operate off-grid and is Teslaâ€™s first fully energy-independent charging location, fulfilling a long-standing vision for sustainable EV infrastructure. The project marks one of the largest Supercharger deployments to date.
author: Analysts Account
